SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics

Record Class ApiKpis

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.ApiKpis
Record Components:
name - failover name, or "__overall__" for the global aggregate
domain - failover domain (falls back to name)
totalCalls - upstreamSuccess + failoverInvoked
upstreamSuccess - failover.store.total{stored=true}
failoverInvoked - recovered + notRecovered + errors
recovered - failover.recovery.outcome.total{outcome=recovered}
notRecovered - failover.recovery.outcome.total{outcome=not_recovered}
errors - failover.recovery.outcome.total{outcome=error}
partial - failover.recovery.partial.total
asyncFailed - failover.store.async.failed — async writes that failed in the executor
latency - store / recover path latency (ms), from failover.operation.duration
rates - derived rate KPIs
public record ApiKpis(String name, String domain, long totalCalls, long upstreamSuccess, long failoverInvoked, long recovered, long notRecovered, long errors, long partial, long asyncFailed, Latency latency, Rates rates) extends Record
Absolute counts plus derived Rates for one failover point (or "__overall__" for the aggregate). Counts are summed from the existing failover.* Micrometer counters — never any payload, key, or argument data (design doc §9).

    Creates an instance of a ApiKpis record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • ApiKpis

      public ApiKpis(String name, String domain, long totalCalls, long upstreamSuccess, long failoverInvoked, long recovered, long notRecovered, long errors, long partial, long asyncFailed, Latency latency, Rates rates)
      Creates an instance of a ApiKpis record class.
      Parameters:
      name - the value for the name record component
      domain - the value for the domain record component
      totalCalls - the value for the totalCalls record component
      upstreamSuccess - the value for the upstreamSuccess record component
      failoverInvoked - the value for the failoverInvoked record component
      recovered - the value for the recovered record component
      notRecovered - the value for the notRecovered record component
      errors - the value for the errors record component
      partial - the value for the partial record component
      asyncFailed - the value for the asyncFailed record component
      latency - the value for the latency record component
      rates - the value for the rates record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
